name: mapa2-v10-4-architecture-decision
description: Mapa 2 V10.4 — decisión de arquitectura de carga de datos y backend sobre V10.3 aprobada.

scripts.build: tsc -b && node scripts/check_v10_client_counts.mjs && vite build && node scripts/check_cloudflare_dist.mjs && node scripts/audit_dist_v10.mjs
scripts.preview:prod: npm run build && npm run preview
scripts.validate:release: npm run build && npm run check:data-contracts && npm run check:business-contracts && npm run check:geo-contracts
scripts.validate:architecture: npm run audit:architecture && npm run audit:data-loading && npm run audit:dependencies
scripts.validate:v10.4: npm run validate:release && npm run validate:architecture
